CSRFToken.description: Required on write endpoints; enforced by middleware.CSRF.
CSRFToken.name: X-CSRF-Token

WorkspaceAuth.description: Workspace hash via query param or JSON body; resolved by workspaceMiddleware.
WorkspaceAuth.name: workspace

WorkspaceRegisteredAuth.description: Workspace must be already-registered (write-path gate); enforced by workspaceRegisteredMiddleware.
WorkspaceRegisteredAuth.name: workspace

info.description: Self-describing OpenAPI 3.0 spec for nano-brain's non-MCP REST API
info.title: nano-brain REST API

post.description: Runs a single harvest pass (OpenCode/Claude Code session ingestion) synchronously
post.summary: Trigger a session harvest run

get.description: Returns the committed OpenAPI 3.0 document describing every REST route in this server. Regenerated via `make generate-openapi`; see docs/openapi.json.

post.description: Re-reads the YAML config file and applies any reloadable settings without restarting the server
post.summary: Reload server configuration

get.description: Reports DB status, migration version, embedding queue depth, and harvester status

post.description: Runs one batch of code-symbol summarization for the workspace, subject to daily budget limits
post.summary: Summarize pending code symbols for a workspace

get.description: Returns unresolved code-symbol summarization failures for the workspace

post.description: Retries code summarization for the given failure_ids
post.summary: Retry specific failed code summarizations

post.description: Retries code summarization for every unresolved failure in the workspace
post.summary: Retry all failed code summarizations

get.description: Reports total/summarized/pending/failed code symbol counts for the workspace
get.summary: Get code summarization status for a workspace

get.description: Returns all collections for the workspace with document counts

post.description: Registers a new file-watched collection under the workspace
post.summary: Add a collection to a workspace

delete.description: Deletes a collection and detaches its file watcher

put.description: Renames a collection and re-points its documents to the new name

get.description: Returns the current resolved config with secrets redacted. Pass ?include_source=true to also return the config file path.

post.description: Applies a single-field patch to the config YAML and triggers a config reload. Secret fields cannot be patched via this endpoint.
post.summary: Patch a single config field

get.description: Runs config and binary prerequisite checks and reports pass/fail status for each
Returns documents for the workspace, optionally filtered by text/collection/tags query params

delete.description: Deletes a document by ID within the workspace

post.description: Embeds a batch of pending chunks (up to an internal limit) for the workspace
post.summary: Embed pending chunks for a workspace

get.description: Streams document/collection/workspace change events for the given workspace as an SSE stream. Not a JSON request/response endpoint — no response body schema.
get.summary: Stream workspace events via Server-Sent Events

post.description: Queues asynchronous flow-graph materialization for the workspace; returns immediately
post.summary: Trigger flow materialization for a workspace

post.description: Fetches a document by source path or ID within the workspace

requestBody.description: Path or ID to look up

post.summary: Get a single document

post.description: Loads all workspace edges, builds a flow starting from entry, and returns the node chain plus an optional Mermaid diagram
post.summary: Build a call-chain flow diagram from an entry point

get.description: Returns the HTTP-route entry edges available for flow tracing in a workspace

post.description: Resolves an HTTP route entry or handler symbol to its stored control-flow graph
post.summary: Get a function's control-flow graph

post.description: Returns nodes that would be impacted (transitively depend on) a given node, up to max_depth
post.summary: Impact analysis for a graph node

post.description: Breadth-first traverses the graph around a focus node up to a given depth
post.summary: BFS graph neighborhood around a focus node

post.description: Returns the top-N most-connected nodes for the workspace and all edges between them
post.summary: Top-N most-connected graph nodes overview

post.description: Recomputes and persists PageRank centrality scores over the workspace's call-edge graph
post.summary: Recompute PageRank scores for the call graph

post.description: Returns outgoing, incoming, or both-direction edges for a given graph node, scoped to a workspace
post.summary: Query graph edges for a node

post.description: Breadth-first traces the outgoing call chain from an entry node, up to max_depth
post.summary: Trace a call chain from an entry node

post.description: Registers a root path as a workspace and creates its default collections (memory, sessions, code). When db is non-nil, all three DB operations are wrapped in a single transaction.
post.summary: Register a workspace

get.description: Resolves a query string as either a document UUID or a title match

parameters.description: Document ID or title to resolve
parameters.name: query

get.summary: Resolve a link query to document IDs

get.description: Returns documents that link to the given doc_id, paginated
get.summary: List documents that link to a document

post.description: Fetches multiple documents by source paths and/or IDs within the workspace

requestBody.description: Paths and/or IDs to look up

post.summary: Get multiple documents in one call

post.description: Runs the hybrid search pipeline (BM25 + vector + RRF fusion) scoped to a workspace
post.summary: Hybrid BM25 + vector search

post.description: Rescans collections for a workspace, enqueueing changed/new files for embedding; force_wipe clears and re-embeds everything
post.summary: Trigger a reindex (incremental or force-wipe) for a workspace

post.description: Extracts and persists function control-flow graphs (CFGs) for JS/TS/Ruby files, incrementally or via full filesystem walk
post.summary: Reindex control-flow graphs for a workspace's code collection

post.description: Deletes all documents (and related code-summarization data) for a workspace without removing the workspace registration itself
post.summary: Delete all documents in a workspace

post.description: Runs a BM25 full-text search scoped to a workspace
post.summary: BM25 full-text search

get.description: Queries sessions tagged "ticket:<id>" across all workspaces (not scoped to a single workspace)
get.summary: Find sessions by ticket ID across all workspaces

get.description: Reports document/chunk/embedding/graph-edge counts, top tags, harvester and watcher status, and recent documents for a workspace

post.description: Summarizes up to `limit` session documents for a workspace via the configured summarizer
post.summary: Summarize pending session documents for a workspace

get.description: Returns indexed symbols (functions, types, etc.) optionally filtered by name query or kind
get.summary: List code symbols in a workspace

get.description: Returns all tags used in the workspace with document counts per tag

post.description: Asynchronously re-extracts graph edges and symbols for all collections in the workspace
post.summary: Re-extract graph edges and symbols for a workspace

post.description: Embeds the query and returns the nearest documents by vector similarity, scoped to a workspace
post.summary: Vector similarity search

get.description: Returns recent memories, active collections, and workspace stats. No workspace middleware on this GET mount.

post.description: Returns recent memories, active collections, and workspace stats. This POST mount is in the data group, gated by workspaceMiddleware.
post.summary: Get a session-start context summary (workspace-scoped)

get.description: Returns all registered workspaces with document/chunk counts

post.description: Computes the workspace hash for a path and reports whether it is already registered
post.summary: Resolve a filesystem path to a workspace hash

delete.description: Deletes a workspace and all its documents. When db is non-nil, deletion runs inside a transaction.

post.description: Creates or updates a document (upsert by content hash), chunks it, and enqueues chunks for embedding
post.summary: Write a document

get.description: Reports the running server version, migration version, and supported API range
Reports DB connectivity, uptime, and workspace count. Always returns 200 (degraded state is reflected in the body, not the status code).

200.description: protocol response (not JSON — see MCP spec)

delete.summary: MCP streamable HTTP transport (protocol endpoint, not a typical JSON REST API — see the MCP spec)

get.description: Bidirectional MCP protocol transport wrapped via echo.WrapHandler; not a JSON request/response endpoint

200.description: protocol response (not JSON — see MCP spec)

get.summary: MCP streamable HTTP transport (protocol endpoint, not a typical JSON REST API — see the MCP spec)

post.description: Bidirectional MCP protocol transport wrapped via echo.WrapHandler; not a JSON request/response endpoint

200.description: protocol response (not JSON — see MCP spec)

post.summary: MCP streamable HTTP transport (protocol endpoint, not a typical JSON REST API — see the MCP spec)

get.description: MCP SSE transport wrapped via echo.WrapHandler; not a JSON request/response endpoint

200.description: protocol response (not JSON — see MCP spec)

get.summary: Server-Sent Events MCP transport (protocol endpoint, not a typical JSON REST API — see the MCP spec)

post.description: MCP SSE transport wrapped via echo.WrapHandler; not a JSON request/response endpoint

200.description: protocol response (not JSON — see MCP spec)

post.summary: Server-Sent Events MCP transport (protocol endpoint, not a typical JSON REST API — see the MCP spec)
